Fixture 10: Perpetual Mode + Multiple Optional Contexts
- Scenario: Perpetual mode, magic modules, playwright results, queue, completion promise
- Invocation: build_prompt(0, "./prd.md", 8) with multiple optional contexts
- Expected Behavior: All optional sections present, perpetual autonomy suffix
- Key Variables:
  - AUTONOMY_MODE: "perpetual"
  - autonomous_suffix: Contains "CRITICAL AUTONOMY RULES" with "always find the next improvement"
  - completion_instruction: References COMPLETION_PROMISE
  - magic_context: Lists Button, Modal specs
  - playwright_info: PLAYWRIGHT_SMOKE_TEST: PASSED
  - queue_tasks: Present
- Test: Verify perpetual mode instructions appear and all contexts are injected
